mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, mechanically increasing equity valuations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.5 percentage points over three months signals deteriorating labor demand and impending earnings contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns are positive in more than 60% of instances where UNRATE spikes above the specified threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly growth in real GDP and monthly increases in housing starts confirm broad-based economic expansion, supporting corporate revenue growth and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX declines when both GDPC1 and HOUST rise simultaneously in more than 50% of overlapping observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates supply chain normalization and higher capacity utilization, which directly boosts short-term corporate margins and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO rises but SPX 5-day returns remain negative in more than 70% of observations over a 2-year test window.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index levels persistently exceeding 235 force prolonged restrictive monetary policy, compressing equity risk premiums and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day returns are positive when CPIAUCSL exceeds 235 in more than 55% of triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total employment and rising unemployment indicates structural labor market friction and wage-push inflation, increasing equity volatility and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX returns do not decline when PAYEMS rises and UNRATE simultaneously increases in more than 60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in retail and food services sales reflects robust consumer spending power, directly supporting corporate earnings estimates and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: RSAFS growth shows zero correlation with 5-day SPX returns over a 5-year rolling window, or directional accuracy falls below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below 1000 thousand units signals tightening credit conditions and weakening aggregate demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns remain positive when HOUST drops below 1000 in more than 65% of triggered observations.
